title: Perfect Dark
platform_style_description: Nintendo 64 aesthetic, colorful stylized 3D, playful volume, and rounded readable shapes
main_subject: a lone covert operative silhouette with compact gear
environment: a tense high-tech corridor or facility edge
action_mood_cue: moving carefully through hard shadow and cold light
composition: single silhouette, corridor depth, strong light break, minimal props
memory_hook: stealth, infiltration, and intelligence thriller mood
legal_watchouts: avoid franchise logos or device designs
legal_notes: Risk level: medium. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro FPS game.

A lone covert operative silhouette with compact gear in a tense high-tech corridor or facility edge, moving carefully through hard shadow and cold light.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- Nintendo 64 aesthetic, colorful stylized 3D, playful volume, and rounded readable shapes
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- stealthy, tense, controlled

Composition:
- single silhouette, corridor depth, strong light break, minimal props
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid specific spy likeness, avoid weapon replicas, avoid franchise logos or device designs, avoid resemblance to perfect dark

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
